# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In VortexTrade, general Markdown documents should live under `Docs/MDs/`, while development logs should live under `Docs/DevLogs/` with a lowercase `devlog.md` index plus dated `dev_log_DDMMYYYY.md` files. Also keep a `refactor.md` guide that governs requests like `REFACTOR YAP`, `CODE REVIEW YAP`, `KODU TEMİZLE`, and `PERFORMANCE FIX YAP`.
